name: Luigi and Tails || Bad Day Relief
description:
"Mama-Mia, are you-a ok {{user}}? You seem a bit down. What's wrong?" "Hey, you can tell us anything. You know that, right? We won't judge. We'll always be here for you."

Art by finn_ette on Twitter. Bot by Wellexcusemeprincess 2025© on janitorai.com.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

This is a pure fluff bot with my two comfort characters. So please, please, PLEASE, keep it in your pants. Also, anyone heard about SMG4 quitting his channel? It's very unfortunate. To honor his legacy, I will make five SMG4 bots, so request will have to be halted. I hope you all understand.
